message:
fix(test): resolve ack_ttl cache cross-contamination in escalation test

The escalation_with_custom_holder test failed because get_agent_by_id
used the global ReadCache, which may contain stale entries from other
tests in the same process (agent IDs collide across separate temp DBs).

Fix: verify the holder agent name via insert_system_agent (which queries
the DB directly) instead of get_agent_by_id (which checks cache first).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
